heading: Purpose
label: 950aaa Purpose
text: The purpose of this chapter is to encourage and improve telemedicine services and distance learning services in rural areas through the use of telecommunications, computer networks, and related advanced technologies by students, teachers, medical professionals, and rural residents.
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section by , see Termination of Chapter note set out below.section 1(b) of Pub. L. 102–551
